releases.title: Glass theme + branding polish
highlights: New cn_glass theme — visionOS-inspired glassmorphic look with auto light/dark mode
Removed Home Assistant Companion install banner from iPhone Safari
Hidden Open Home Foundation badge from the launch splash screen
Cards now feel premium with translucent surfaces and subtle blur

releases.title: Stability fix — no more loading freeze
highlights: Fixed browser freeze on port 7080 — 'Loading data' hang is resolved
Branding now waits for Connect Nest to fully load before activating
Fixed hide-leaks observer walking entire DOM on every update

releases.title: Quick-links, notifications & wallpaper
highlights: Sidebar now shows Devices, Automations, Dashboards, and Apps shortcuts
User avatar replaced with Connect Nest icon
Branded notification styling — teal accents throughout
Custom 'page not found' screen with CN branding
Background wallpaper now included — no internet needed at startup

releases.title: Installation fix + uninstall guide
highlights: Fixed installation failure on first-time install (Dockerfile build error)
Improved build diagnostics — Supervisor logs now show step-by-step progress
New detailed uninstall guide in the docs folder
Display name updated to Connect Nest FrontEnd

releases.title: Connect Nest Frontend — first standalone release
highlights: Brand-new About Connect Nest panel — replaces the old About page
One-tap WhatsApp, email, and phone support inside the app
Live System Health widget — at a glance check on your hub
New cn_light theme for daytime use, alongside cn_dark
Cleaner sidebar — less clutter, more Connect Nest
Faster startup on first install
